title: AIIMS Delhi Project Scientist B Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
short_info: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Project Scientist B Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of AIIMS Delhi. Has been announced through the AIIMS Delhi Project Scientist B Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: As per Government of India ICMR rules

qualification.education_qualification: 1st Class Master's degree in Life Sciences, Physical Science or PhD Degree
qualification.details: Project Scientist B : 1st Class Master's degree in Life Sciences, Physical Science, and Chemical science from a recognized university with 2 years of research experience or PhD Degree (As per ICMR Rule).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Project Scientist B Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Project Scientist-B (Non-Medical) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Project Scientist-B (Non-Medical) post is 25th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the required educational qualification for Project Scientist-B (Non-Medical)?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a 1st Class Master's degree in Life Sciences, Physical Science, or Chemical Science, along with 2 years of research experience or a PhD Degree as per ICMR rules.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Scientist-B (Non-Medical) post is 35 years, with age relaxation applicable as per Government of India ICMR rules.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply by sending their complete application via email.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Project Scientist-B (Non-Medical) post?
faq.answer: The selection process for this position will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Project Scientist-B (Non-Medical) is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q8. Where is AIIMS Delhi located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Delhi is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110029.

faq.question: Q9. What is the salary for the Project Scientist-B (Non-Medical) role?
faq.answer: The salary for this post will be as per the ICMR-sanctioned amount.
